hero.tagline: Where discipline meets passion. For all ages, all levels.

about.welcome_text: Our club, led by international champion Handu (black belt since 2019), trains athletes of all ages in the disciplines of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu (BJJ) and Mixed Martial Arts (MMA). Based in Le Gosier, Guadeloupe, since 2020, we offer a professional training environment where discipline, respect, and excellence are at the heart of our teaching approach.
about.mission1: Train technically and mentally complete athletes
about.mission2: Develop self-confidence and respect for others
about.mission3: Prepare for national and international competitions
about.mission4: Create a strong community around martial values

jjb.title: Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu
jjb.description: BJJ is a martial art that develops coordination, self-confidence, respect, and strategy. Accessible to everyone, it allows mastering effective control and submission techniques.
jjb.feature1: Kids (4–12 years): playful learning and psychomotor development
jjb.feature2: Teens & Adults: technical improvement and competition preparation
jjb.feature3: Recreational: practice for fun, fitness, and well-being

mma.title: MMA (Mixed Martial Arts)
mma.description: Mixed Martial Arts combine striking, takedowns, and submissions for a complete combat system. Our MMA program is designed to develop versatile and mentally prepared athletes.
mma.feature1: Controlled sparring: safety and progression guaranteed
mma.feature3: Intermediate and advanced levels: advanced technique and tactics

planning.title: Training Schedule
planning.subtitle: Our classes are scheduled throughout the week to fit your availability. Whether you are a beginner or experienced, child or adult, you will find a slot that suits you.
planning.no_class: No classes scheduled for this day.
planning.trial_text: Contact us via WhatsApp to book your first session with no commitment.

subscriptions.title: Our Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Join our community and benefit from rates suitable for all profiles. Choose the plan that matches your goals and commit to your martial journey today.
subscriptions.payment_info: All payments are secured via HelloAsso.
subscriptions.validity: Validity: All memberships are valid until 12/31/2031 (except for short-term offers).
subscriptions.renewal: Automatically renewed 30 days before the start of the new year.

plans.student_info: Special rate for students. An accessible investment for your personal development.
plans.adult_info: Flexible plans to adapt to your commitment and sports goals.
plans.mma_info: Combine disciplines to become a complete fighter with excellent value for money.
plans.family_info: Share your passion with your family with our preferential rates. Train together and progress together!

shop.title: Official Shop
shop.subtitle: Get equipped with our official Hand Fight products! All items are available on-site at the club or by order via WhatsApp.

products.name: Kid's Kimono
products.description: Available in black, white, and blue.

products.name: Adult's Kimono
products.description: Available in black, white, and blue.

handu.name: Handu — Professor & Black Belt
handu.bio: An international champion, Handu earned his black belt in 2019 and settled in Guadeloupe in 2020 with a clear mission: to train champions, on the mat and in life. With over 20 years of experience in competition and teaching, he brings high-level technical expertise and a teaching approach that combines high standards with kindness.
handu.philosophy2: Development of confidence and a champion's mindset
handu.philosophy4: Complete preparation: physical, technical, and psychological

palmares_avant.title: Fortaleza Open IBJJF
palmares_avant.description: Victory in all categories at the prestigious IBJJF tournament in Brazil

palmares_avant.title: Salvador Fall Open
palmares_avant.description: Champion in his weight class in Salvador

palmares_avant.title: European IBJJF No-Gi
palmares_avant.description: Bronze medal at the No-Gi European Championship

palmares_avant.title: Brazilian Circuit
palmares_avant.description: in São Paulo, Brasilia, Salvador and other major Brazilian national competitions

items.description: Jessica Gabriel wins gold in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu.
Silver: Harold Beaugendre. Bronze: Sebastien Cnudde, Emerick, Yannis.
Gold: Harold Beaugendre. Silver: Erickson Lafeuille. Bronze: Diana Penalva, Cedrick, Mathieu Balagne, Geoffrey Marie Joseph.
Or: Geoffrey Marie Joseph, Mathieu Balange. Argent: Harold Beaugendre.
Gold (Gi & No-Gi): Kevin. Silver (Gi) & Bronze (No-Gi): Diana. Bronze (Gi & No-Gi): Cedrick Loe Sack Sioe.

caribbean.description: Winner of the Best Club award for the 2023, 2024, and 2025 seasons.

team.champions_subtitle: At Hand Fight, we are proud to train the next generation of champions. Our students shine on national and international podiums, proving the excellence of our training method.

champions.name: Harold Beaugendre
champions.title: Club's multi-medalist
champions.description: A pillar of the team, Harold is known for his power and his impressive track record at the European level.

champions.name: Diana Penalva
champions.title: International Competitor
champions.description: A seasoned competitor, Diana stands out for her technique and consistency on the international circuit.

champions.name: Anna Rolland
champions.title: Brazil Vice-Champion 2025
champions.description: A promising athlete who has already made her mark on the international stage, proving her technique and determination.

champions.name: Jessica Gabriel
champions.title: European Champion 2026
champions.description: Gold medalist at the European BJJ Championship in Lisbon in January 2026. An incredible performance that confirms her status as a top-level athlete.

records.description: Known for her technique and determination

gallery.title: Competition Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Relive the highlights of our athletes on national and international podiums. These images testify to the technical excellence and fighting spirit that reign within Hand Fight.
gallery.alt_joe: Geoffrey Marie Joseph on the podium

news3.title: Jessica Gabriel, European Champion in Lisbon!
news3.description: Jessica Gabriel wins the gold medal at the European BJJ Championship in Lisbon. An incredible performance that confirms her status as a top-level athlete.

news1.title: Bebê is French Champion!
news1.description: Erickson "Bebê" Lafeuille wins the French Champion title with two gold medals. An exceptional performance!

news2.title: French Championship Prep
news2.description: Our team is intensifying training for the upcoming French Championship. Extra technical sessions and high-level sparring on the agenda.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Ready for a new challenge? Contact the Hand Fight team for BJJ or MMA. Start your adventure today!
contact.whatsapp_action: Message us for a quick response
